home.title: Unmatched
home.subtitle: Zero duplicates. Total cooperation. The web-based word game where great minds mustn't think alike.

rules.title: How to Play
rules.tagline: A cooperative word game for 3–8 players.

setup.title: Setup
setup.body: Open the game on a <bold>big screen</bold> (TV or laptop) and let everyone join from their <bold>phones</bold>. The big screen shows the current phase; your phone is your private hand. You need between 3 and 8 players.

goal.title: Goal
goal.body: Work together to guess <bold>as many secret words as possible</bold> across 13 rounds. The catch: everyone gives clues at the same time, and <bold>matching clues cancel each other out</bold>. Think differently, win together.

hints.title: Drop a Hint
hints.body: One player is the <bold>Guesser</bold> (the role rotates each round). Everyone else sees the secret word and secretly writes a <bold>single-word clue</bold>. With 3–4 players you each write two clues, with 5 or more just one.

filter.title: Filter the Clues
filter.body: The player next to the Guesser becomes the <bold>Filter</bold>. They see every clue, and the app auto-removes any that are identical. The Filter can also strike out clues that break the rules (too similar, not a real word, etc.).

guess.title: Guess the Word
guess.body: The Guesser sees only the surviving clues and must name the secret word. If it feels hopeless they can <bold>pass</bold> — no points gained, none lost.

validate.title: Moment of Truth
validate.body: The Filter decides whether the Guesser's answer counts. Typos and close variants are usually fine — use your judgment and keep it friendly.

scoring.title: Scoring
scoring.total: After 13 rounds, your score is shown on the big screen. A perfect game is 13 — brag accordingly.

clueRules.title: Clue Rules
clueRules.oneWord: Clues must be a single word — no spaces, no hyphens joining two ideas.
clueRules.duplicates: Identical clues cancel automatically. Aim for something unusual but still useful.
clueRules.variants: Avoid variations of the secret word, translations, or clues that are basically the word in disguise.
clueRules.fairPlay: No hand signals, sound effects, or side conversations. The clue is all you have.

join.title: Resume
join.subtitle: Enter the room code your friends shared to jump back in.
join.roomNotFound: Room not found. Check the code and try again.
join.alreadyStartedSubtitle: This room is in the middle of a match. Ask your friends to start a new game when they're done.

lobby.roomNotFoundSubtitle: Double-check the code, or head back and start a new game.

game.clueInstruction: Give a <bold>one-word</bold> clue that helps the guesser find this word.
game.clueInstructionTwo: Give two <bold>one-word</bold> clues that help the guesser find this word.
game.filterInstruction: Remove clues that are too similar or violate game rules. Only valid and unique clues should remain for the guesser.
game.guessInstruction: Analyze the surviving clues and identify the secret word.

waiting.title: Wait a bit!
waiting.pendingClues: Some players still need to submit their hints.
waiting.filterBody: <bold>{{name}}</bold> is working on validating the clues.
waiting.guessBody: <bold>{{name}}</bold> is working on guessing the word.
waiting.validateBody: <bold>{{name}}</bold> is working on validating the answer.

validate.title: Moment of truth
validate.hint: As the Filterer, you decide if their logic is close enough to count!

game.guesserLine: <bold>{{name}}</bold> is guessing this round. Send one-word clues — duplicates will be removed.

finish.subtitle4: Not bad. You could certainly do better.
finish.subtitle7: Average. It's a good start. Try again!
finish.subtitle9: Good. A first step towards glory?
finish.subtitle11: Very good! You should be proud!
